name: Leek Salad with Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the leek and cut it into small rings. Peel and core the pineapple and cut into small slices. Cut the pineapple into small pieces.
2. Mix the sour cream, mayonnaise, and seasonings in a bowl. Add the fruits and leeks, then stir in the chopped parsley.
